CHAPTI.SUBJECT: chapter i—Administrative Committee of the Federal Register

DIV3.HEAD: CHAPTER I—ADMINISTRATIVE COMMITTEE OF THE FEDERAL REGISTER

DIV8.HEAD: § 1.1 Definitions.
DIV8.P: As used in this chapter, unless the context requires otherwise—
Administrative Committee means the Administrative Committee of the Federal Register.

DIV8.HEAD: § 2.1 Scope and purpose.
DIV8.P: (a) This chapter sets forth the policies and procedures.

DIV8.HEAD: § 2.2 Administrative Committee of the Federal Register.
DIV8.P: The Administrative Committee is established by section 1506 of title 44.
